mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vocabulary_entries( user_id, wordbook_id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, category, difficulty, visibility, audio_url, import_source, created_at ) VALUES
( #{entry.userId}, #{entry.wordbookId}, #{entry.word}, #{entry.phonetic}, #{entry.meaningCn}, #{entry.exampleSentence}, #{entry.category}, #{entry.difficulty}, #{entry.visibility}, #{entry.audioUrl}, #{entry.importSource}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
